catalog.title: Birch Glacier Collapse and Landslide Dataset
catalog.description: Dataset collected during the 2025 Birch glacier collapse and landslide at Blatten, CH-VS

collections.title: Webcam Images
collections.description: Time-series webcam imagery from monitoring cameras

collections.title: Radar Velocity Data
collections.description: Interferometric radar velocity measurements per ROI

collections.title: Digital Surface Models
collections.description: Digital Surface Models (DSM) from drone and heliborne surveys

collections.title: Point Clouds
collections.description: LiDAR and photogrammetric point cloud data

collections.title: 3D Models
collections.description: 3D visualization models for Sketchfab and similar platforms

items.description: All images zoomed to the channel below Lower Birchgletscher, taken hourly during daylight hours
All Deformation analyses, varied frequency
items.internal_commentary: redundant with 04Ba01 and 04Ba02 (subsets of this data package)

items.description: Deformation analyses, processed 2-3 times per day
items.internal_commentary: redundant with larger package 04Ba00

items.description: Deformation analyses, processed once per day
items.internal_commentary: redundant with larger package 04Ba00

items.dataset: a - Velocities per ROI, all models
items.description: Median, max and inverse velocities per ROI, incl. rainfall data at Blatten, Jeizinen, Bruchji, Baltschieder
All images of deposition area - taken with varied frequency
items.internal_commentary: redundant with 08Aa01 and 08Aa02 (subsets of this data package)

items.description: Images of deposition area - taken hourly
items.internal_commentary: redundant with larger package 08Aa00

items.description: Images of deposition area - taken every 30 minutes
items.internal_commentary: redundant with larger package 08Aa00

items.description: Position, distance from origin, raw velocity, last azimuth.
items.internal_commentary: Ideally all GPS-Data (station 10&11) in one download-folder '10M_11M_GNSS', which is referred to by all Codes (from 10Ma00 to 11Mh00)

geo_metadata.crs:
BOUNDCRS[
    SOURCECRS[
        PROJCRS["CH1903+ / LV95",
            BASEGEOGCRS["CH1903+",
                DATUM["CH1903+",
                    ELLIPSOID["Bessel 1841",6377397.155,299.152812800003,
                        LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],
                PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,
                    ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],
                ID["EPSG",4150]],
            CONVERSION["unnamed",
                METHOD["Hotine Oblique Mercator (variant A)",
                    ID["EPSG",9812]],
                PARAMETER["Latitude of projection centre",46.9524055555556,
                    ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
                    ID["EPSG",8811]],
                PARAMETER["Longitude of projection centre",7.43958333333333,
                    ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
                    ID["EPSG",8812]],
                PARAMETER["Azimuth at projection centre",90,
                    ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
                    ID["EPSG",8813]],
                PARAMETER["Angle from Rectified to Skew Grid",90,
                    ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
                    ID["EPSG",8814]],
                PARAMETER["Scale factor at projection centre",1,
                    SCALEUNIT["unity",1],
                    ID["EPSG",8815]],
                PARAMETER["False easting",2600000,
                    LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],
                    ID["EPSG",8806]],
                PARAMETER["False northing",1200000,
                    LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],
                    ID["EPSG",8807]]],
            CS[Cartesian,2],
                AXIS["easting",east,
                    ORDER[1],
                    LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],
                AXIS["northing",north,
                    ORDER[2],
                    LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],
            ID["EPSG",2056]]],
    TARGETCRS[
        GEOGCRS["WGS 84",
            DATUM["World Geodetic System 1984",
                ELLIPSOID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563,
                    LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],
            PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,
                ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],
            CS[ellipsoidal,2],
                AXIS["latitude",north,
                    ORDER[1],
                    ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],
                AXIS["longitude",east,
                    ORDER[2],
                    ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],
            ID["EPSG",4326]]],
    ABRIDGEDTRANSFORMATION["Transformation from CH1903+ to WGS84",
        METHOD["Position Vector transformation (geog2D domain)",
            ID["EPSG",9606]],
        PARAMETER["X-axis translation",674.374,
            ID["EPSG",8605]],
        PARAMETER["Y-axis translation",15.056,
            ID["EPSG",8606]],
        PARAMETER["Z-axis translation",405.346,
            ID["EPSG",8607]],
        PARAMETER["X-axis rotation",0,
            ID["EPSG",8608]],
        PARAMETER["Y-axis rotation",0,
            ID["EPSG",8609]],
        PARAMETER["Z-axis rotation",0,
            ID["EPSG",8610]],
        PARAMETER["Scale difference",1,
            ID["EPSG",8611]]]]
